description.en: Reject AMM swaps with slippage above 0.5%

cedar_text: forbid(principal, action == Action::"Amm::Swap", resource) when { context.slippageBp > 50 };

description.ko: ERC-20 approve에서 max U256 승인 거부
description.en: Reject ERC-20 approve calls with U256::MAX amount

cedar_text: forbid(principal, action == Action::"Erc20::Approve", resource) when { context.amountIsUnlimited == true };

description.en: Warn on ERC-20 transfers exceeding $10,000 USD

cedar_text: permit(principal, action == Action::"Erc20::Transfer", resource) when { enrichment.totalInputUsd > decimal("10000") };

description.ko: Aave 차입 후 HF가 1.5 미만이면 차단
description.en: Block borrow when resulting HF would drop below 1.5

cedar_text: forbid(principal, action == Action::"Lending::Borrow", resource) when { enrichment.postHealthFactor < decimal("1.5") };

description.ko: /spenders 카탈로그에서 blocked로 분류된 주소로의 전송 거부
description.en: Reject sends to addresses tagged 'blocked' in /spenders

cedar_text: forbid(principal, action, resource) when { context.recipient in BlockedSpenders };
